message:
feat(core): Improve search tokenization for programming language terms

Enhances the search system to better handle programming language-related
queries:

Synonyms Expansion (synonyms.ts):
- nodejs: ["node", "js"] - Maps Node.js variations
- reactjs: ["react"] - Maps React.js to React

These ensure searches for "node" find "nodejs" content and vice versa.

Tokenization Allowlist (tokenize.ts):
- Adds ALLOWLIST set containing: ["c", "r"]
- Modifies token filter to preserve single-letter tokens in allowlist
- Before: tokenize("c programming") → ["programming"]
- After: tokenize("c programming") → ["c", "programming"]

This fixes search for C and R programming languages, which were
previously filtered out as "too short" tokens. The allowlist approach
is conservative - only explicitly allowed single letters are preserved.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
